Title: MiA,ViG - Event # 1
Notes: Mars in Aries, Venus in Gemini - Instance 1 of the Constellation of This. The Original Event occurring whilst in Toronto.

Title: MiA,ViG - Event # 2
Notes: Mars in Aries, Venus in Gemini - Instance 2 of the Constellation of This, the Delayed Event - happening 2 years later than the normal cycle. The moment This Universe waited.

Title: MiA,ViG - Event # 3
Notes: Mars in Aries, Venus in Gemini - Instance 3 of the Constellation of This, the 2nd of this set of three.

Title: MiA,ViG - Event # 4
Notes: Mars in Aries, Venus in Gemini - Instance 4 of the Constellation of This, the 3rd of this set of 3, perhaps the last we shall ever see.
